violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan covers has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The floors in the back ware-washing area was observed to be in poor repair (damaged epoxy exposing non-smooth/easily cleanable floors). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. Per PIC, ice machine will be cleaned this week. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
